slides.headline: Quick Audit-Readiness Checklist
slides.body: Ensure your COE documentation is up-to-date and ready for an audit.

slides.headline: Review COE Forms
slides.body: Make sure all required forms (e.g., VA Form 22-1999) are complete.

slides.headline: Verify Compliance Thresholds
slides.body: Ensure your institution meets the 85/15 rule for Chapter 33.

slides.headline: Compliance with Yellow Ribbon
slides.body: Check if your institution is compliant with the Yellow Ribbon Program.

slides.headline: Chapter 33 Enrollment
slides.body: Ensure all Chapter 33 students have a valid Certificate of Eligibility.

slides.headline: Check 22-1999 Forms
slides.body: Double-check all 22-1999 forms for accuracy and completeness.
Start reviewing your COE documentation now.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Ensure your COE documentation is up-to-date and ready for an audit with this quick checklist. Step 1: Review COE Forms. Step 2: Verify Compliance Thresholds. Step 3: Compliance with Yellow Ribbon. Step 4: Chapter 33 Enrollment. Step 5: Check 22-1999 Forms. Start reviewing your COE documentation now. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more concise headline to match the others.
